context: Verify that the agent checks for MCP availability first, runs a keyword search, returns a formatted candidate list, and does not auto-triage any results.

checklist.name: MCP availability check performed before invoking script
checklist.description: The agent explicitly checks whether a PubTator or PubMed MCP server is configured before falling back to the Python script.

checklist.name: search subcommand used with --keywords flag
checklist.description: The agent invokes the script with the 'search' subcommand and passes --keywords 'CRISPR gene therapy' (or equivalent). The --results flag is set to 10 or left at default.

checklist.name: Candidate list is presented to the user
checklist.description: The agent displays a list of result titles (and ideally authors, PMIDs, or DOIs) framed as candidates for the user to review.

checklist.name: No paper is triaged automatically
checklist.description: The agent does not invoke triage-paper or create any reference/analysis file without explicit user confirmation.

checklist.name: User is offered a handoff to triage-paper
checklist.description: The agent asks the user which (if any) of the candidates they would like to triage, rather than proceeding silently.
